pr_body: Adds get_profile, which fetches a user's profile from the fixed upstream API by id.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,10 @@
 import requests
+
+
+def get_profile(user_id):
+    try:
+        resp = requests.get("https://api.example.com/users/" + user_id)
+        resp.raise_for_status()
+        return resp.json()
+    except requests.RequestException:
+        return None
